body:
@sepo-agent implement this small sandbox task.

Goal: create a tiny documentation artifact that proves the Sepo Agent can make a real code/doc change through the Codex + TokenFlux path.

Change requested:
- Add a new markdown file at `docs/agent-capability-smoke.md`.
- The file should explain in 5-8 bullet points what this sandbox Sepo Agent can do now that Codex runs through the OpenAI-compatible relay.
- Mention this is a sandbox smoke test.
- Do not change production behavior, workflows, secrets, or package dependencies.

Acceptance:
- One new markdown file only.
- No secrets.
- No workflow/config changes.

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-10/codex-26273964616`

Added docs/agent-capability-smoke.md as the only working-tree change, with six bullets describing the sandbox Sepo Agent capability smoke test and explicitly avoiding production, workflow, config, secret, and dependency changes. Verified with `git status --short --untracked-files=all`, `find docs -maxdepth 2 -type f -print`, and `awk '/^- / { count++ } END { print count }' docs/agent-capability-smoke.md` showing one new file and 6 bullets.

title: Sepo live smoke: add agent capability note
